html:
Prerequisites: Python experience (10 hours at least) required

Materials: students need to purchase the following items: 1, Raspberry Pi Kit from: https://a.co/d/fHRuqCH

or https://www.canakit.com/raspberry-pi-4-extreme-aluminum-case-kit.html

    2.        Power Supply for Raspberry Pi 3

https://www.amazon.com/dp/B00MARDJZ4 3. 16GB Micro SD Card (Class 10 recommended) https://www.amazon.com/dp/B074B4P7KD 4. Raspberry Pi Starter Kit (includes jumper wires, sensors, etc.) https://www.amazon.com/dp/B06W54L7B5
